# Goran Radmanovic — Senior Web Developer (Comprehensive Profile)

> Full technical dossier, detailed skill matrix, and project implementation frameworks for Senior Web Developer Goran Radmanovic.

## About Me & Professional Philosophy

I am a highly motivated, results-oriented Senior Web Developer with over 8 years of professional experience. My core expertise lies in architecting user-centric, high-performance web applications using modern frontend and backend technologies. I fast-track the adoption of emerging tech stacks, learn rapidly, and excel at delivering visually appealing, intuitive digital products tailored to precise client specifications. 

### Core Specializations
- **Architectural Design:** Crafting Single Page Applications (SPAs) and Progressive Web Applications (PWAs) with a heavy focus on performance and SEO optimization.
- **Industry Experience:** Delivering robust software solutions across highly competitive, high-traffic sectors including IoT (Internet of Things), E-commerce, Sports Betting platforms, and Fintech systems.
- **Collaboration Model:** Available for specialized freelance collaboration, remote contract engineering, and technical consulting.

---

## Detailed Technical Skill Matrix

### Frontend Ecosystem
- **Frameworks:** Vue.js (v2/v3), Nuxt.js (Server-Side Rendering & Static Site Generation)
- **Core Languages:** JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3 / Advanced Semantic Web
- **Styling & UI:** Responsive Design, UI/UX Focused Development, Tailwind CSS, Sass/SCSS
- **Application Types:** Single Page Applications (SPA), Progressive Web Applications (PWA)

### Backend & Full Stack Integration
- **Core Languages:** PHP, NodeJS
- **Concepts:** Full-stack feature integration, RESTful API consumption and development, State Management (Pinia/Vuex), Modern Frontend Technologies integration.

### Performance & Quality Assurance
- **Optimization:** Code splitting, lazy loading, asset optimization, web vitals enhancement, and cross-browser performance tuning.
- **UX Engineering:** Component-driven development, semantic accessibility, and clean interface animations.

---

## Professional Experience & Implementation Methodologies

My career spans over eight years of engineering robust web applications, collaborating within cross-functional teams, and managing direct client relationships as a freelancer. 

### Key Technical Competencies Demonstrated:
- **Scalable Architecture:** Building modular frontend systems utilizing Vue and Nuxt that scale smoothly under heavy user loads.
- **Cross-Industry Domain Expertise:** 
  - *IoT:* Engineering dashboards to visualize complex real-time data streaming from connected hardware.
  - *E-commerce:* Architecting secure, fast checkout funnels and highly responsive product catalog engines.
  - *Betting & Fintech:* Creating low-latency, real-time data rendering setups capable of handling instant financial transactions or rapid odds updates safely.
- **Freelance Project Delivery:** Full lifecycle management from initial discovery and wireframing up to deployment, continuous integration, and cloud hosting setup.

---

## Portfolio & Case Studies

*Note: Live project work, interactive case studies, and visual walkthroughs of completed web solutions are dynamically managed and displayed via the main portfolio website.*

### Highlighted Project Typologies Covered:
1. **Dynamic Content Hubs:** Built with Nuxt.js for optimized server-side rendering, instant page transitions, and automated schema injection.
2. **Interactive Dashboards:** Developed with Vue.js, utilizing lightweight state management and optimized reactivity pipelines for data-dense interfaces.
3. **E-commerce Solutions:** High-conversion storefronts integrated with modern checkout systems and headless CMS platforms.
